About TDC

Tuition Experts You Can Trust

The Development Centre has been empowering students across South Africa for over 10 years. We believe every child has the potential to succeed — they just need the right environment and support.

Our tutors are qualified, passionate, and committed to your child's growth. With a 100% Matric pass rate in 2024, our results speak for themselves.

  • 10 years of experience & thousands of success stories
  • Affordable rates with personalised 1-on-1 tuition
  • Monthly progress report & study plan included
  • Access to tutors 24/7
  • Free study booklet worth R150 when you sign up
  • In-person and online classes available
What We Offer

All Grades. All Subjects.

📐

Mathematics

From basic numeracy to advanced calculus — we make maths click for every learner.

🔬

Physical Science

Chemistry and Physics made clear with real-world examples and targeted exam prep.

📖

Languages

English, Afrikaans and more — improve comprehension, writing and oral performance.

💼

Accounting & Business

Financial statements, business concepts and exam confidence.

🌍

Geography & History

Humanities support with exam-focused notes and revision strategies.

🌐

Online & In-Person

Flexible sessions — attend our centre or learn from home. Same quality, your schedule.

Simple Process

How Does TDC Work?

3 simple steps and your child is on the way to better marks.

1

Ready? — One-on-One Lessons

Lessons once a week, one hour per subject. One tutor, one student — online or in-person.

2

Set — Full Package Included

Monthly report · Access to tutors 24/7 · Study plan & assessment · Free study booklet worth R150.

3

Go! — Let's Do It!

Quick assessment → Registration → Tuition slot reserved → Tuition begins.

Why Private Tutoring?

Benefits of Private Tuition

Individual & Unique Learning

Lessons tailored to your child's specific needs.

Encourages Independence

Students develop responsibility and self-directed study habits.

Improves Academic Performance

Targeted support leads to measurable mark improvements.

Better Attitude to Learning

Students become more engaged and motivated.

Self-Directed Learning

Builds skills to study independently and effectively.

Self-Esteem & Confidence

Success in school builds confidence that carries through life.

From Our Tutors

Study Techniques

🇯🇵 The Japanese Technique

Vary your study and break intervals to maintain focus and avoid burnout:

Study 15 min → Break 5 min
Study 12 min → Break 3 min
Study 25 min → Break 12 min
Study 8 min → Break 5 min

NOTE: Break time must never exceed study time. No distractions during study blocks.

📝 Revision Techniques

  1. Use flowcharts and diagrams
  2. Practice old exam papers
  3. Explain work to others
  4. Organise study groups with friends
  5. Take regular breaks
  6. Maximize practice testing
  7. Highlight, re-read and summarize notes
Real Clients. Real Results.
